what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a generated JPEG image asset named keystone-v3-trial in the design-source channel, describing it as a generated trial intended to be compared against a source image.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime image/jpeg, zero width/height, source claude_code, author_session, created timestamp, and empty links
Body text is a single sentence: 'a generated trial to compare vs source'
The image dimensions w and h are both 0
The source field is set to claude_code and links is empty
standouts: Generated image asset with an explicit comparison-against-source intent
Recorded width and height are both 0 despite being an image file
Blob stored on b2 with a hash-like identifier
conventions: Uses ledger frontmatter with YAML metadata followed by a short markdown body
Uses image:// and blob:// URI schemes for address and blob
Includes provenance fields such as source, author_session, and created
concerns: Width and height are 0, suggesting missing or unpopulated image metadata
Description is minimal and does not specify what is being depicted or compared
links array is empty, so no explicit relationship to the source is recorded
notes: A ledger stub for a generated design-source image trial meant to be compared to its source, with placeholder dimensions and no outgoing links.
questions: What is the specific source image or design asset this trial is meant to compare against?
What visual content or design does keystone-v3-trial represent?
Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What criteria will be used to evaluate the trial against the source?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose of being a generated trial for comparison matches the file's role as an image ledger entry, but the actual pixel dimensions are not populated.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to catalog a synthetic image alongside its source so the two can be compared, likely for quality or design fidelity review.
contribution: Provides a discoverable, timestamped provenance record for a generated image asset and captures the explicit intent to compare it against a source.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger record for a generated JPEG image named keystone-v3-trial in the design-source channel, annotated as a trial for comparison against a source image, with zero recorded dimensions and a B2 blob reference.
intention_for_embedding: To track a generated image trial and support comparison with its source design asset.
